events.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview with Emily Rodriguez
events.location: InnovateTech Headquarters, 500 Innovation Drive, Building A, San Jose, CA 95110
events.description: Interview on Thursday, February 12, 2026 from 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM PST. On-site at InnovateTech Headquarters, 500 Innovation Drive, Building A, San Jose, CA 95110. Check in at the front desk and ask for Emily Rodriguez. Schedule: 1:00 PM - Technical Interview (coding), 2:00 PM - System Design Discussion, 2:45 PM - Team Fit / Q&A. Bring government-issued photo ID and portfolio (optional). Parking available in visitor lot.
